headline: Sources: Jets get their QB, trade with Raiders for Geno Smith
description: The Jets are trading for the Raiders' Geno Smith, reuniting the quarterback with the team that drafted him in 2013, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.

headline: 2026 NFL draft position rankings: Kiper, Miller, Muench, Reid, Yates
description: Who are the best players at every position? Our analysts give their top-fives, plus their combined overall top-10 ranking for the 2026 class.

headline: Why Stephen A. remains skeptical over Steelers
description: Stephen A. Smith refuses to get excited about the Steelers' prospects until they officially resolve their quarterback question.
